project.name: product-scraper
project.description: Product scraper micro-service with AI vision analysis. Multi-layer scraping engine supporting Shopee, Lazada, Boots, Amazon, TikTok Shop.

nodes.name: .env
nodes.summary: Environment variables for product scraper configuration.

nodes.name: ecosystem.config.js
nodes.summary: PM2 ecosystem configuration for the product scraper microservice.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, httpx, playwright, pillow.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI server entry point with all REST endpoints for product scraping, analysis, export, and scheduled scraping. Handles CORS, static files, and API key auth.

nodes.name: scraper.py
nodes.summary: Multi-layer stealth scraping engine. Fallback chain: HTTP request → Playwright browser with stealth → JSON-LD extraction → returns raw product data. Supports Shopee, Lazada, Boots, Amazon, TikTok Shop with site-specific extraction patterns.

nodes.name: scraper_service.py
nodes.summary: Service layer wrapping scraper with API key management, usage billing, product caching, category detection, and export to pipeline. Manages ScrapeLog, CreditUsage, PriceHistory.

nodes.name: analyze_pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Product analysis pipeline: normalizes raw scraped data from multiple sources, enriches with AI (OpenCode/Mistral), downloads product images to local storage, and exports to TikTok UGC Studio format.

nodes.name: db_models.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy ORM models for the scraper. Tables: ApiKey, ScrapedProduct, ScrapeLog, CreditUsage, PriceHistory, ScheduledScrape, AnalyzedProduct. Includes scraping tiers config.

nodes.name: analyzer.py
nodes.summary: Vision-based product analysis fallback using Mistral Pixtral. Analyzes product images to extract name, price, description, brand, SKU. Also provides OpenCode API enrichment.

nodes.name: analyzer_db.py
nodes.summary: CRUD operations for analyzed products. Stores analyzed data in PostgreSQL with dedup by product_id+source or title+source.

nodes.name: analyze_models.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request/response models for analysis pipeline API endpoints. AnalyzeRequest, BatchAnalyzeRequest, AnalyzeFromScrapeRequest, ScrapedProductListItem.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic data models for scrape requests/responses. ScrapeRequest, ProductData, ScrapeResponse, BatchScrapeItem, ExportToPipelineRequest, ScheduledScrapeCreate.

nodes.name: export_service.py
nodes.summary: Google Sheets export service. Pushes scraped product data to Google Sheets via Service Account authentication.

nodes.name: scheduler.py
nodes.summary: Background scheduler loop that checks every 60 seconds for due scheduled scrapes and executes them. Supports hourly, daily, weekly, monthly schedules.

layers.name: API Gateway
layers.description: FastAPI server and routing layer — entry point for all client requests

layers.name: Scraping Engine
layers.description: Multi-layer extraction: HTTP → Playwright → JSON-LD → Vision. Includes platform-specific scrapers.

layers.name: Analysis Pipeline
layers.description: Product data normalization, AI enrichment, and image download pipeline

layers.name: Data & Models
layers.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models, Pydantic request/response schemas, and configuration

layers.name: Export & Scheduler
layers.description: Background scheduler for recurring scrapes and Google Sheets export service

layers.name: Package Structure
layers.description: Package init markers for module and platform subpackages

tour.title: Service Entry Point
tour.description: FastAPI server on port 8106. All scraping, analysis, and export endpoints are registered here. Also loads env config and starts the background scheduler.

tour.title: Data Models & Schemas
tour.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models define the database schema. Pydantic models define the API contract for requests and responses.

tour.title: Scraping Engine
tour.description: Multi-layer scraping with proxy rotation and site-specific extraction. Falls back through HTTP → Playwright → JSON-LD → Vision AI analysis.

tour.title: Service Layer: Auth, Cache, Billing
tour.description: API key management (scp_ prefix), usage tracking and monthly billing, product caching with 24h TTL. Orchestrates scrapes with full audit trail.

tour.title: Analysis Pipeline
tour.description: Normalizes raw scraped data from various sources (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok), enriches with AI, downloads product images for TUS.

tour.title: Scheduling & Export
tour.description: Background scheduler checks every 60s for due scrape jobs. Export service pushes product data to Google Sheets via Service Account.
